name: cross-loop emission record carries the source pr-corpus pattern id alongside each downstream consumer event so origin is always traceable
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop && printf '{"source_pattern_id":"no-eval","origin":"pr-corpus","consumers":["standards","compliance","rubric"]}\n' > ref.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cross-loop/emit.sh" --reference ref.json --log .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop/events.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"source_pattern_id":"no-eval"' .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop/events.jsonl && grep -q '"origin":"pr-corpus"' .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
